# OpenNMS-derived fixture notice

This directory contains reduced topology fixture subsets derived from OpenNMS Enlinkd test resources.

- Upstream project: https://github.com/opennms/opennms
- Reference commit: `057ded59`
- Upstream license: AGPL-3.0-or-later
- Upstream license text: https://github.com/opennms/opennms/blob/057ded59/COPYING

## Usage and compliance

- These files are used only as `testdata` fixtures for development and tests.
- These files are not installed or packaged in Netdata release artifacts.
- Their in-tree inclusion has been reviewed through the project's licensing and compliance process.

See [ATTRIBUTION.md](ATTRIBUTION.md) for the exact upstream source paths and the subset criteria used for these fixtures.
